archetype: Organic & Earthy + Swiss & High-Contrast (Indian B2B Trust)

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Use Tetris Grid (Mode A) for Features; Standard 12-col for Hero.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl for major cards, rounded-xl for buttons
layout_and_spacing.shadows: shadow-sm for cards, shadow-md on hover

sections_instructions.navbar: Sticky at top, z-50. bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-100. Navy text for links. Gold/Navy primary CTA.
sections_instructions.hero: Asymmetric split layout. Left: Large H1 'India\'s Retail Supply Engine' (Navy), H2/Subtitle (Slate 600). Two CTAs ('I am a Retailer' - Navy, 'I am a Brand' - Outline). Right: Overlapping imagery of Indian shopkeeper & grocery shelves using provided URLs. Add a floating glassmorphism '60 Days Credit' badge.
sections_instructions.stats_strip: Full-width section, bg-white, border-y border-slate-200. 4-col grid on desktop. Big numbers in Navy, labels in Slate 500 uppercase.
sections_instructions.how_it_works: Editorial Ribbon style. 3 steps. Lots of negative space (gap-24). Large step numbers (opacity-10). Clean white cards with subtle shadow.
sections_instructions.features_grid: Bento Grid (Mode A: Tetris style). Grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Cards: bg-white border border-slate-100. 4 features: Curated Catalog, Instant Credit, 60-Day Exchange, Fast Delivery.
sections_instructions.for_brands_cta: Color inversion. bg-[#003087] (Navy) text-white. High contrast. Large heading. Accent button in Gold (#FFD700) text-black.
sections_instructions.footer: Simple, clean footer. bg-white border-t border-slate-200. Left: Logo, description. Right: Links, Contact (anas983shaikh@gmail.com).

motion_and_interactions.hover: Cards: -translate-y-1 shadow-lg transition-all duration-300. Buttons: bg-opacity-90 scale-[1.02].
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-up for grid items using Framer Motion (initial={{opacity: 0, y: 20}} animate={{opacity: 1, y: 0}}).
motion_and_interactions.test_ids: Mandatory data-testid attributes for all CTAs (e.g., 'retailer-cta-button', 'brand-cta-button').

media.description: Indian shopkeeper writing at desk, representing Kirana owner.
Bustling Indian grocery store filled with products.
Grocery store aisle filled with food.
Delivery person carrying cardboard boxes outside.

do_not_do_list: DO NOT use full blue background gradients.
DO NOT use standard equal-square 3-column card layouts for features (use Bento/Tetris instead).
DO NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Stick to Bricolage Grotesque.
DO NOT make the hero image a full-bleed dark overlay. Let it sit in a white space context as a cut-out or cleanly framed asset.
DO NOT forget data-testid on buttons.
DO NOT use placeholder images from dummy services.
instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure tailwind.config.js is updated to extend colors and fonts. Import Bricolage Grotesque and Plus Jakarta Sans from Google Fonts. Build only the landing page with these precise stylistic rules.
